name: Chocolate Muffins with White Chocolate Chunks
recipeIngredient: 8 tablespoons (1 stick) unsalted butter, melted and cooled
1 large Egg, at room temperature, lightly beaten
6 ounces White chocolate, cut into 3/4-inch chunks
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a rack in the center of the oven and preheat to 375°F. Lightly butter twelve 1 1/8-by-2 3/4-inch (3-ounce) muffin cups and the edges surrounding the cups.
2. In a large bowl, stir together the flour, sugar, cocoa, baking powder, salt, and baking soda. In another bowl, stir together the milk, butter, egg, and vanilla until blended. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients. Add the liquid ingredients and stir just to combine. Stir in half of the white chocolate chunks.
3. Pour the batter into the prepared muffin cups. Sprinkle the tops with the remaining white chocolate chunks. Bake for 20 to 25 minutes or until a cake tester inserted in the center of one of the muffins comes out clean.
4. Allow the muffins to cool in their pans on a wire rack for 5 minutes. Remove the muffins from the cups and finish cooling on the wire rack. Serve warm, or allow them to cool completely and store the muffins in an airtight container at room temperature.
Yield: 12 muffins
